summary_from_search: FOMC held rates at 3.5%-3.75% on April 29, 2026. Historic 8-4 split dissent — last such split was October 1992. Inflation elevated above 2% target due to Trump tariffs and soaring energy prices. This may have been Powell's final meeting as Chair. Markets pricing in no changes through 2026 and into 2027.
